roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL:PAROLE PHC/X:DA APPEARING VIA ZOOM/X:STATE PAROLE AGENT ROBERT ABAKAN PRESENT IN COURT/3000ADM/X:PAROLEE ADMITS VIOLATION #1 - ABSCONDING AND#4 - BURGLARY/3000REIN/PAJ:94 DAYS/X:WITH TIME LOST/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 47 DAYS/4019HALF/X:BALANCE OF PETITION IS DISMISSED/SA2:1010 MISSION ST & BAYANIHAN HOUSE AT 88 SIXTH ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/X:ORDER FOR VICTIM RESTITUTION FILED/X:THE COURT ORDERS PAROLEE TO PAY RESTITUTION TOVICTIM, THE BAYANIAN HOUSE IN THE AMOUNT OF $750,00 PLUS INTEREST AT 10 PERCENT PER YEAR FROM THE DAT OF SENTENCING PLUST AN ADMINISTRATIVE FEE NOT TO EXCEED 15 PERCENT OF THE RESTITUTION OWED/X:ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT - RESTITUTION FILED/ /X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC STATUS OF CONDITION/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/X:PAROLE CASE MANAGER CHARLES BROWN IS PRESENT,/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/NB/X: 1OF 2 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE/NIGHTSERV/

/CAL:PAROLE PHC/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR PRESENT/X:DEFENSE COUNSEL RECEIVED LETTER FROM JAIL SERVICES STATING PAROLEE  NEEDS FOLLOW-UP TREATMENTAS SOON AS POSSIBLE FOR HIS SERIOUS HEALTH CONDITIONS/25    CPC 4011,6 REPORT/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 4011,6/JAIL PSY/4011,6/REP:04-14-22/M31/CTORD: FOR JAIL HEALTH SERVICES (ATTN: DR, MAINS) TO REPORT TO THE COURTIF THEY CAN HELP WITH THE TRANSPORTATION OF THE PAROLEE TO TOM WADDELL CLINIC/CTORD: FOR THE PAROLE AGENT TO REPORT TO COURT THEIR ABILITY TO ASSIST WITH THE TRANSPORTATION TO AND FROM THE CLINIC/CONTD: RECEIPT OF 4011,6PC REPORT & REPORT FROM PAROLE (ABILITY TO TRANSPORT PAROLEE)/
